canto_title: The Prophecy of Ugo Ciappetta and the Catalog of Avarice

scenes.summary: Dante describes the difficulty of navigating the rocky, narrow path.
An outburst of loathing toward the hungry beast.
Dante wonders when the current worldly order will reach its end.
Dante hears the sounds of women weeping for a holy place.
The voices shift to honoring the poverty of Fabrizio and the generosity of Niccolò.
Dante addresses the voice, asking for its identity.
The shade identifies himself as the source of decay in France.
The shade recounts his humble origins and his ascent to power.
The shade describes the fraudulent expansion of French territories.
The shade mentions the deaths of Curradino and the Pope.

scenes.scene_name: The Prophecy of the New King
scenes.summary: A vision of a future king’s impact on the city of Florence.
A description of a father selling his daughter for profit.
Predictions of rising greed within the Church and the Temple.
Dante asks about divine justice and receives a cryptic response regarding the timing of answers.
A rapid-fire list of mythological and historical figures consumed by gold.
Dante realizes he is the only living listener to this monologue.
An earthquake strikes, filling Dante with intense terror.
A sudden burst of angelic praise interrupts the chaos.
The trembling stops, and the travelers continue their journey through the weeping shadows.
Dante reflects on his intense desire for knowledge and his confused state of mind.
